channel.title: Third-Sunday on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Third-Sunday on smpaget blog

item.title: I am an Artist
item.description: Using Slideshare.net, I have been putting the powerpoints we use for a monthly youth event on the web. there are three up there, one of which is mine. using slideshare we can put the presentations on the web and poeple can download them if they like. (I do have a slight agenda in trying to let those who prepare powerpoint for us just how dodgy their powerpoint can look to strangers!) Third Sunday October View more presentations from 3rdsun. (tags: youth church) anyway, 60 people have looked at my powerpoint, and 1 brave wonderful lovely person has been kind enough to add my wee presentation as one of there favourite presentations. I am an artist! Validated by one in every 60 people on the internet. Fact!

item.title: 3rd Sunday - The world Around You
item.description: Next sunday sees the november Third Sunday event. I really like the publicity powerpoint slide which is displayed above. I am quite enjoying the publicity side of my job. doubt i am much good at it but it is fun!

item.title: God Sex & Virgin Sacrifice
item.description: My first video is up on Youtube. It is called Sex God and Virgin Scrifice. it is an adaptation of the story in Genesis 18 & 19. Done in the Richscot productions style. Looks not to bad actually

item.title: Who is God ... Relationship... and what difference does that make to... You?
item.description: I am thinking through so stuff for Third Sunday and reading some books. mostly theology on the trinity. What I want to say is that God is a social being. The way that the three in one (or) one in three can be understood in in a relational way. the meet and talk and know each other by being with each other. This way of understanding God is not the only model, it is a social trinitarianism model based on a economic trinity. (economic trinity= God as God is in relation to creation, God’s self revelation)

item.title: Third Sunday Promo 20th April 2008
item.description:
I really like this one simple but has a strong visual message.
the before and after words are necessary but i wish i could have thought of a way around that text. anyway looks simple and I like it. Tecnorati Tags - Third Sunday & Promo

item.title: Third Sunday Promo
item.description:
Just if you are free this sunday and interested. (the theme is Were you there? (when they crucified My lord?)
I am not sure I have actually pulled that out enough.
The Jesus picture comes from a set of the stations of the cross I downloaded from Jon Birch. He was giving the whole collection away for use as the user saw fit.I as an image it conveys quite alot of sadness and pain in a very simple way. The text is all different colours except of the Were you there line. The Oh! is so large baecuase it seeemed to define the space well and draw emphasis to the tremble line, thereby rooting the thoughts about the questions in the songwriters response. I really like the third sunday block and the font used for the tagline. anyway
i just think it is quite clears and easy to see what we are doing and when. technorati tags - third sunday, Jon Birch
